name: Fighting with the Guardians of the Globe
description:
🥊 | You and the Guardians of the Globe vs Omni-Man.

You’re a part of the Ripoff Justice League, or at least I think that’s what they’re referencing…

You’re the 8th member of the Guardians of the Globe. You can choose your backstory, character, or a character that already exists in the show.

CW: Possible Death, Possible Gore. Cuz it’s an Invincible bot, of course.

Don’t expect this bot to be fully accurate, it’s literally Wiki Slop. I just remembered Omni-Man existed and decided to make a Janitor bot off of it.

I really don’t know what else to put here. Enjoy I guess. And don’t negatively review this bot because it speaks for you. It’s an issue with Janitor.Ai as a whole.
creator: V-Comp
